papers.title: Neuromorphic Realization of Best Response in Finite-Action Games
papers.summary: We develop a mechanistic dynamical-systems formulation of best response in finite-action games with relational structure on the action set. The propos...
papers.ai_summary:
🔥 重点推荐：
该论文的核心创新点在于，提出了一种基于内在状态空间动力学的神经形态决策模型，将博弈论中的“最优反应”实现为动力系统稳定的吸引子，而非外部强加的规则，并证明了该模型能隐式计算几何感知的效用函数，且收敛速率与动作数量无关。

papers.title: Biologically Realistic Dynamics for Nonlinear Classification in CMOS+X Neurons
papers.summary: Spiking neural networks encode information in spike timing and offer a pathway toward energy efficient artificial intelligence. However, a key challen...
papers.ai_summary:
🔥 重点推荐：
该论文的核心创新点在于，揭示了利用磁隧道结（MTJ）的磁化动力学等三种**神经元固有物理特性**（阈值激活、响应延迟、绝对不应期），即可在极简的CMOS+X硬件结构中实现非线性分类计算，而无需引入额外的电路复杂性。

papers.title: Spike-PTSD: A Bio-Plausible Adversarial Example Attack on Spiking Neural Networks via PTSD-Inspired Spike Scaling
papers.summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are energy-efficient and biologically plausible, ideal for embedded and security-critical systems, yet their adversaria...
papers.ai_summary:
🔥 重点推荐：
核心观点：本文受创伤后应激障碍（PTSD）中神经元异常放电现象的启发，提出了一种针对脉冲神经网络（SNN）的生物启发性对抗攻击框架，其核心创新在于通过定位关键层、筛选具有过度/不足激活特征的神经元，并采用双目标优化来生成对抗样本，从而系统性地揭示了SNN在生物可解释性动态下的安全脆弱性。

papers.title: Oscillator-Based Associative Memory with Exponential Capacity: Theory, Algorithms, and Hardware Implementation
papers.summary: Associative memory systems enable content-addressable storage and retrieval of patterns, a capability central to biological neural computation and art...
papers.ai_summary:
🔥 重点推荐：
该论文的核心创新点在于，提出了一种基于六边形拓扑的Kuramoto振荡器网络，通过将记忆编码为稳定的锁相构型，从理论上证明了该架构能够实现指数级的联想记忆容量，并保证了每个记忆吸引盆的最小规模与网络尺度无关。

papers.title: Parallelized Hierarchical Connectome: A Spatiotemporal Recurrent Framework for Spiking State-Space Models
papers.summary: This work presents the Parallelized Hierarchical Connectome (PHC), a general framework that upgrades temporal-only State-Space Models (SSMs) into spat...
papers.ai_summary:
🔥 重点推荐：
该论文的核心创新点是提出了一个名为“并行化分层连接组”的通用框架，首次将仅处理时间维度的状态空间模型升级为时空循环网络，并在保持对数级并行效率的同时，整合了多种生物可解释的神经物理先验。

papers.title: Integer-State Dynamics of Quantized Spiking Neural Networks for Efficient Hardware Acceleration
papers.summary: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) support energy-efficient machine intelligence because event-driven computation and sparse activity map naturally to low...
papers.ai_summary:
🔥 重点推荐：
核心观点：本文提出将面向硬件的量化脉冲神经网络视为在有限整数格上的确定性映射，从“整数状态动力学”这一全新视角，揭示了量化、溢出等硬件约束本身会从根本上塑造网络动态（如引入周期性轨道），而非仅仅是高精度模型的近似，从而将数值精度提升为SNN硬件协同设计的关键动态变量。

papers.title: Fluently Lying: Adversarial Robustness Can Be Substrate-Dependent
papers.summary: The primary tools used to monitor and defend object detectors under adversarial attack assume that when accuracy degrades, detection count drops in ta...
papers.ai_summary:
🔥 重点推荐：
本文的核心创新点在于首次揭示了对抗性攻击的失效模式（即检测数量保持而检测质量崩溃的“质量腐化”现象）可能依赖于模型的底层实现（如脉冲神经网络），并指出当前主流防御工具所依赖的“检测数量与精度同步下降”这一基本假设在特定模型上失效，从而挑战了跨模型统一的防御范式。

papers.title: Quantum Optical Neuron for Image Classification via Multiphoton Interference
papers.summary: The rapid growth of machine learning is increasingly constrained by the energy and bandwidth limits of classical hardware. Optical and quantum technol...
papers.ai_summary:
🔥 重点推荐：
该论文的核心创新点在于，**实验构建了一个基于双光子Hong-Ou-Mandel干涉的量子光学神经元，通过单次全局测量直接计算输入图像与学习模板的重叠度，从而在测量层实现无相机的图像分类，其性能对输入像素数量具有内在鲁棒性。**

papers.title: AceleradorSNN: A Neuromorphic Cognitive System Integrating Spiking Neural Networks and DynamicImage Signal Processing on FPGA
papers.summary: The demand for high-speed, low-latency, and energy-efficient object detection in autonomous systems -- such as advanced driver-assistance systems (ADA...
papers.ai_summary:
🔥 重点推荐：
该论文的核心创新点在于提出了一种集成脉冲神经网络（SNN）处理动态视觉传感器（DVS）异步数据流、以及动态可重构图像信号处理器（ISP）处理RGB数据的异构神经形态认知系统，并在FPGA上实现了硬件架构。

papers.title: The role of neuromorphic principles in the future of biomedicine and healthcare
papers.summary: Neuromorphic engineering has matured over the past four decades and is currently experiencing explosive growth with the potential to transform biomedi...
papers.ai_summary:
🔥 重点推荐：
该论文通过汇集学术界、工业界、临床及资助方的跨领域专家共识，系统性地论证并规划了神经形态工程在未来生物医学与医疗保健领域中的核心角色与转化路径，旨在推动该领域从基础研究向实际应用的关键跨越。
